title: ManaStorage
description: Adds a storage system to store Mana from Botania
body:
Adds a storage system to store Mana from Botania.

This mod adds 4 types of blocks:  
The ManaStorage Core, which is the center of the storage system, with everything binding to it.  
Storage blocks, which store mana when connected to a ManaStorage Core.  
Importers, which can import mana from any generating flowers or mana pool, they are facing.  
Exporters, which can import mana to any functional flowers or block able to hold mana that is spark attachable, they are facing.

The mod also adds 2 items:  
The Network Linker, which links importers and exporters to a ManaStorage Core.  
The ManaStorage Tablet, which funtions as a mana tablet when connected to a ManaStorage Core.  

All information is also available in the Lexica Botania, including recipes.
